title: 借りたフォーマッターを適用する

cases.name: 前後の文字列を付ける

input.factory: () => ({ receiver: { name: "Mika", score: 42 }, formatter: function(prefix, suffix) { return prefix + this.name + ":" + this.score + suffix; }, args: ["@", "!"] })
() => ({ receiver: { label: "north", rank: "B" }, formatter: function() { return this.label + "/" + this.rank; }, args: [] })

cases.name: 数値を使って文字列を作る

input.factory: () => ({ receiver: { price: 80, fee: 10 }, formatter: function(count) { return "total=" + (this.price * count + this.fee); }, args: [3] })
() => ({ receiver: { first: "JS", second: "Primer" }, formatter: function(left, middle, right) { return left + this.first + middle + this.second + right; }, args: ["[", ":", "]"] })
